sections.scope: Add a login form to the example app.
sections.non-goals: No SSO/OAuth integration in this change.
sections.audience: End users of the example app.
sections.compatibility: No breaking changes to the existing session API.
sections.security: Rate-limit login attempts; never log raw passwords.
sections.performance: Login submit responds within the p95 budget below.
sections.observability: Emit a login_attempt metric with outcome label.
sections.rollout: Ship behind no flag — small, additive UI change.
sections.acceptance: A user can log in with valid credentials and is rate-limited after 5 failures.
